summary: Konekt B2B Platform Correction Pass (Enforcement) - All features verified. StandardDrawerShell migration complete for PaymentProofsAdminPage and SalesContentHubPage. Affiliate form has payout method toggle with conditional fields and NO commission inputs. Promotions form simplified with NO discount_type/discount_value inputs. CRM page width contained to max-w-7xl. Team Alerts page redesigned with Reference column, Owner/Rep names, and contextual CTA buttons.

minor.issue: reference and lead_id fields are present but empty for some alerts - this is a data issue (leads missing contact_name/company_name/id), not a code issue

issues: Console warnings about duplicate React keys (product-) - minor code quality issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: SalesContentHubPage has duplicate key warnings - consider adding unique keys to mapped elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Correction Pass features verified. Admin auth uses localStorage key 'konekt_admin_token'. Staff auth uses 'konekt_staff_token'. StandardDrawerShell uses React Portal (createPortal to document.body) with z-index 9998 backdrop and 9999 panel.

details: PaymentProofsAdminPage uses StandardDrawerShell for proof detail drawer
Drawer has testId='proof-detail-drawer'
Footer contains approve/reject buttons for pending proofs
Page loads at /admin/finance/payment-proofs (empty state when no proofs)
SalesContentHubPage uses StandardDrawerShell for content preview
Drawer has testId='sales-preview-drawer'
Shows product image, Download Image button, price, Ready Captions (WhatsApp/Sales, Short Caption, Social Post), Promo Code
Page loads at /staff/content-hub with tabs (All, Products, Services)
Form shows Identity section: Name, Phone, Email, Affiliate Code
Payout Setup section with toggle: Mobile Money / Bank Transfer
Mobile Money selected: shows Mobile Money Number + Provider fields
Bank selected: shows Bank Name + Account Name + Account Number fields
Commission section shows 'Automatically managed by system settings' (read-only)
NO commission_type or commission_value inputs in form
Optional section: Notes, Active toggle
Form shows: Promotion Name, Promo Code, Description, Scope (All Products/Specific Category/Specific Product)
Stacking Rule options: No Stacking, Stack with Cap, Reduce with Affiliate, Referral Priority
Date fields: Start Date, End Date
Usage Limits: Max Total Uses, Max Per Customer
Customer Message field
NO discount_type or discount_value inputs
Info note: 'Discount is automatically calculated based on pricing policy settings (distributable margin and promotion allocation)'
CRM page has class 'max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 py-6'
Page is contained within max-w-7xl, not stretching edge-to-edge
Heading text is 'CRM' with text-xl size
Table columns: Sev, Type, Reference, Message, Owner/Rep, Date, Action
Reference column present (shows lead contact_name/company_name when available)
Owner/Rep column shows resolved names (not raw IDs)
Action column has contextual CTA buttons
CTA buttons: 'Open CRM' for overdue_followup/stale_lead, 'Review Payments' for pending_payments
28 critical alerts displayed with proper severity icons
/api/admin/team-performance/summary returns alerts with 'reference' and 'lead_id' fields
Alerts have resolved owner names via _resolve_name() function
Alert types: overdue_followup, stale_lead, pending_payments
